base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_fire_man — a tile (level_layout) from 1987 mega man. Fire Man stage — flame-factory. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Fire Man stage — flame-factory; rising fire-pillars
